title: erysimum mairei
intro: Erysimum mairei, also known as Maire's Wallflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Erysimum mairei include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. Erysimum mairei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
